creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 173928
patch of devel/rubygem-gitlab_git

Hello,

i attached the patch of rubygem-gitlab_git. I do not believe the next update hits the tree before the end of the week. So lets get this fixed beforehand.

Vlad already described the "bundler-way" to fix. This is a good workaround but will cause problems later, especially since bundler completely ignores pkg. When you apply the patch and make a "make reinstall" be sure you removed gitlab_git from bundler via bundler.
Please let me know if this fixes the issue! :)

Greetings,
Torsten
